projects.title: Styles By Sheyu
projects.tagline: Modern hair salon website with online booking
projects.description: Website for a local hair salon enabling online appointment booking, service browsing, and customer management.
highlights: Developed a full-stack website with admin and client interfaces to manage and track bookings
Structured and linked PHP and MySQL backend to store available/booked appointment times
Increased efficiency for both owner and client by immediately updating available slots and sending appontment confirmation email

projects.title: Pathfinder
projects.tagline: WhatsApp AI chatbot helping immigrants navigate employment
projects.description: Multi-ligual AI chatbot delivered over WhatsApp that guides immigrants through employment and authorization processes with multilingual support — meeting users on a platform they already trust.
highlights: Integrated Claude 3 Haiku via Anthropic API for accurate, context-aware responses
Conducted user testing, user research, and LLM benchmarking to optimize response quality
Multi-level evaluation combining task benchmarks and iterative user feedback
